## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Ambient account transition from Strategy Sprint to ongoing content management](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ambient is a physical security company focused on gun detection, threat detection/response, and access control](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [They're highly engaged, review all content, and are cautious about competitor mentions](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Current workflow: 5 articles/week, manual indexing required, publishing via Strapi CMS](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2264.0)
  - [Transition plan: Overlap on next call, deep dive within 2 weeks, handoff in \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)

## Topics

### Ambient Product Overview

  - [Physical security company with 5 main products](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Key offerings: gun detection, threat detection/response, access controls, access intelligence](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Uses AI for contextual analysis (e.g. detecting concealed weapons, behavioral analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Positions as proactive vs. reactive security (buys "seconds to minutes" before incidents)](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

### Content Strategy & Workflow

  - [5 articles/week, focused on specific campaigns (e.g. gun detection)](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Moving into vertical-specific content (healthcare, education, corporate campuses)](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
  - [Airtable workflow: Ready for Review → Revisions → Ready to Publish](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)
  - [Manual indexing required in Search Console (articles not auto-indexed)](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)
  - [Strapi CMS for publishing (moving to Webflow, timeline TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2009.0)

### Client Relationship & Preferences

  - [Small team (3 contacts) highly engaged in content process](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Very specific about product messaging and features](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Cautious about competitor mentions (no positive mentions allowed)](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Interested in AI usage and improvements](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [Main goal: increase impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

### Transition Plan

  - [Deep dive with Ambient team in next 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2145.0)
  - [GrowthX team to join next weekly call for introduction](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
  - [Full handoff aimed for \~2 weeks from now](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
  - [Sydney to provide one-pager summary and key meeting recordings](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to coordinate with Ada on transition communication](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2461.0)
  - [Sydney to share one-pager summary and key meeting recordings](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review past meeting recordings](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2550.0)
  - [Mara to confirm content manager assignment with Bridget](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2390.0)
  - [Schedule GrowthX team join for next Ambient weekly call](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2461.0)
  - [Plan for full account transition within \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/vuUCuBjJ8HUkutdgFMPex14skWq6z2sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
